feed.title: Yearbook of the German Cognitive Linguistics Association
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Yearbook of the German Cognitive Linguistics Association (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Frontmatter
entry.summary: Authors: Antje Endesfelder Quick, Stefan Hartmann DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-frontmatter1 Pages: Page range: i-vi

entry.title: The role of phonemic and subphonemic cues in morphological learning
entry.summary: Authors: Dinah Baer-Henney, Dominic Schmitz DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0001 Pages: Page range: 1-36

entry.title: Individual differences in the constructicon: German noun phrase agreement
entry.summary: Authors: Hendrik A. Kligge, Ewa Dąbrowska, Thorsten Piske DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0009 Pages: Page range: 37-88

entry.title: A dynamic network approach to language in aphasia: Individual differences in spoken and non-verbal communication
entry.summary: Authors: Antje Endesfelder Quick, Marvin Zurek, Rachel Hatchard DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0003 Pages: Page range: 89-126

entry.title: The development of flexibility and abstraction in the acquisition of the German ditransitive construction
entry.summary: Authors: Laura Patrizzi DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0002 Pages: Page range: 127-164

entry.title: The effect of cognitive load on linguistic fluency, lexical production, and emotional polarity: An exploratory study on self-directed French
entry.summary: Authors: Mathilde Hutin, Frédéric Tomas DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0007 Pages: Page range: 165-192

entry.title: How literacy acquisition changes L1 grammatical knowledge
entry.summary: Authors: Tan Arda Gedik DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0004 Pages: Page range: 193-212

entry.title: From linguistic creativity to conformity: the case of [zurNungkommen/bringen]1
entry.summary: Authors: Fabian Fleissner DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0005 Pages: Page range: 213-242

entry.title: Light verb constructions and the Principle of No Synonymy – A case study on Germanstehen unter-LVCs
entry.summary: Authors: Jens Fleischhauer DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0008 Pages: Page range: 243-272

entry.title: Names, semantics, and cognition in native varieties of the potato tubercle in the peasant community of Pampacorral (Lares, Cuzco): Towards a cognitive approach to the naming process
entry.summary: Authors: Frank Joseph Domínguez Chenguayen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/gcla-2025-0006 Pages: Page range: 273-302
